summary: Real Usage Loop features tested successfully. All 14 backend tests passed (analytics endpoints, session logging, onboarding events, system status error monitoring). Frontend loads correctly with all key components rendering. RetentionNudges component correctly hidden until action completion. Onboarding 3-step flow works for new users.

issues: DataCloneError messages from Emergent integration script - not blocking functionality but visible in console

critical_code_review_comments: Analytics service (analytics.py) correctly implements log_event, log_session, get_daily_summary, get_event_log
Session logging in auth.py correctly calls log_session with deduplication per user per day
Onboarding first-action in admin.py correctly logs both onboarding_complete and trust_change events
System status endpoint correctly returns recent_errors array and total_errors_logged count
RetentionNudges component correctly renders only when visible=true (actionCompleted state)
DailyBaseSelection component gates daily action correctly until base is selected

success_rate.frontend: 100% (all key components rendering, no React errors)

verified_endpoints.GET /api/analytics/summary?days=3: 200 - returns daily_actions, missions_joined, globe_points, trust_changes, return_sessions
verified_endpoints.GET /api/analytics/events?limit=5: 200 - returns recent raw events with user_id, event_type, timestamp
verified_endpoints.POST /api/auth/login: 200 - logs session_start event (deduplicated per user per day)
verified_endpoints.GET /api/system/status: 200 - returns 5 healthy components + recent_errors array + total_errors_logged

verified_frontend_components.DailyBaseSelection: Gates daily action until base selected
verified_frontend_components.Tab Navigation: All tabs (בית, פיד, קהילה, תובנות, תיאוריה, היסטוריה) accessible
verified_frontend_components.Onboarding Modal: 3-step flow for new users with direction selection

seed_data_creation: Created test onboarding data during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Real Usage Loop features verified. Analytics events logged to analytics_events collection. System status includes error monitoring. RetentionNudges appears after actionCompleted=true in HomeTab. DailyBaseSelection component requires API data to render selection buttons (returns null if !data). Console shows DataCloneError from Emergent script but doesn't affect functionality.

mocked_apis.note: All APIs use real database operations
